name: Grafana
description: The open-source platform for monitoring and observability
compose:
name: slashnode-grafana
services:
  web:
    image: grafana/grafana:13.0.3
    container_name: web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    volumes:
      - web_data:/var/lib/grafana
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3030:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-grafana_web_data
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (grafana). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://grafana.com. Default login — user: "admin", password: "admin". ⚠️ SECURITY: ships a default password ("admin") — must be changed on first login.
